word: H3613 - כָּלֵב אֶפְרָתָה - Kâlêb ʼEphrâthâh - kaw-labe' ef-raw'-thaw - Caleb-ephrathah

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלב אפרתה

Transliteration: kâlêb 'ephrâthâh

Phonetic: kaw-labe' ef-raw'-thaw

BDB Definition:

Caleb-ephratah = "dog or ash heap"
  1. a place in Gilead

Origin: from H3612 and H672

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
